message:
fix(registry,crashpack,choreography,lab,runtime): audit fixes across 7 files

- cx/registry: add holder/region identity check in commit_permit to prevent
  cross-task privilege escalation via transferred NamePermit (HIGH)
- trace/crashpack: shell-escape env var keys in build_command_line to prevent
  command injection via malformed crash packs (MEDIUM)
- trace/crashpack: cap wall_clock_nanos u128→u64 cast via min() (MEDIUM)
- obligation/choreography: fix loop label scope leak on duplicate labels;
  only remove label from set if insert actually succeeded (MEDIUM)
- lab/runtime: capture old_nanos before advance_time in inject_clock_skew
  for accurate logging (MEDIUM)
- lab/runtime: apply cancel and budget_exhaust independently in chaos
  injection instead of letting budget_exhaust silently suppress cancel (MEDIUM)
- runtime/state: add debug_assert guard against double create_root_region
- h2/frame: rewrite manual range check as !(MIN..=MAX).contains(&value)
- stream/collect: convert if-then-panic to assert! (clippy manual_assert)
- rustfmt on 8 files with pre-existing formatting drift

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
